entities.name: Information Standstill
entities.context: Paradigm where AI automation wastes processing power moving data between unread silos, decoupling information volume from human understanding

entities.name: Jevons Paradox
entities.context: Economic principle explaining how efficiency gains lead to increased production rather than time savings

entities.name: Automated Synthesis and Filtration
entities.context: Recommended focus for software designers - filtering for relevance and synthesizing rather than just moving data

entities.name: Processing Efficiency
entities.context: The efficiency of generating and moving text, which is dropping toward zero with AI

entities.name: Consumption Efficiency
entities.context: Human ability to actually consume and understand information - the true bottleneck

entities.name: Cognitive Load
entities.context: Mental burden on users that tools should reduce rather than increase

entities.name: Noise Floor
entities.context: The baseline level of low-value data that overwhelms consumers when automation lacks filtration

relationships.context: Information Standstill is described as a manifestation of Jevons Paradox in the AI automation domain
These are distinct and decoupled - processing efficiency does not equal consumption efficiency
Proper synthesis and filtration reduces cognitive load rather than increasing it
Information Standstill increases the noise floor by producing more low-value data
